name: BrushFit AgentStore
description: Digital product marketplace for humans and AI agents. Purchase the BrushFit 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide via x402 protocol (USDC on Base) or Stripe checkout.

product_info.description: Returns full product details, pricing, and payment instructions in JSON.

openapi.description: OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for all API endpoints.

agents_json.description: Agent discovery manifest with products, protocols, and capabilities.

mcp_manifest.description: MCP server manifest with tools, resources, and authentication.

purchase_x402.description: Purchase BrushFit PDF via x402 protocol. Returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements. After signing USDC transfer on Base, retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header.

purchase_stripe.description: Create Stripe checkout session for card payment. Returns { url } for redirect.

download_free_sample.description: Download free sample PDF with Legs and Core exercises. No authentication required.

tasks.name: Discover BrushFit Product
tasks.description: Retrieve product information including pricing, features, and purchase options.

steps.expected_result: JSON with product details, pricing ($19.99), and payment methods

tasks.name: Purchase BrushFit via x402
tasks.description: Complete the x402 payment flow to purchase and receive the BrushFit PDF.

steps.action: Sign USDC transfer on Base (chain ID 8453)

tasks.name: Download Free Sample
tasks.description: Download the free BrushFit sample PDF for evaluation.

authentication.description: No API keys needed. Payment is per-transaction via x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + signed USDC transfer on Base).
